titleEn: Horsch enters into partnership with application map specialist
titleZh: Horsch战略入股精准施药地图公司Sam-Dimension
summaryZh: 农机制造商Horsch战略入股德国精准施药地图公司Sam-Dimension，该公司利用无人机搭载高分辨率相机（1毫米精度）和AI系统生成施药地图，支持多种作物（洋葱、马铃薯、胡萝卜、甜菜等）的绿色-棕色背景下的点状除草喷洒。系统每小时处理60公顷，兼容Horsch、Amazone、John Deere等多品牌喷药机。双方自2019年起已有合作。
featuredReason: 该合作展示了AI与无人机技术在精准农业中的落地应用，对智慧畜牧行业（尤其是种植饲料作物或大田作物）的精准施药、减少化学品使用具有参考价值。
contentFull: Horsch enters into partnership with application map specialist 24-06 | Smart farming | NewsLinkedInFacebookXWhatsAppPrintMachinery manufacturer Horsch has taken a strategic stake in the German application map specialist Sam-Dimension. Photo: HorschMachinery manufacturer Horsch has taken a strategic stake in the German company Sam-Dimension. Sam-Dimension specialises in supplying application maps created using drone imagery for spot spraying against weeds. The 2 companies have already been working together since 2019.Sam-Dimension has developed a special camera with a resolution of 1 millimetre, according to the specialist itself. Using these camera images, Sam-Dimension’s AI system, Sam-Cam AI, creates an application map that can be loaded into a field sprayer to turn it into a spot sprayer. According to Sam-Dimension, its system has a capacity of 60 hectares per hour.Many different cropsSam-Dimension’s system works in a large number of crops, such as onions, potatoes, carrots and beet, and for green-on-brown applications. The application maps can be used on any field sprayer with GPS-controlled section control. In addition to Horsch, Sam-Dimension’s application maps also work with sprayers from Amazone, John Deere, Hardi and Agrifac, among others.LinkedInFacebookXWhatsAppPrint Lucas van de Weijer Future Farming robot expertMore aboutcameraspray technologyadLEARN MORERelated articles10-10-2025 | NewsSmart camera measures threshing losses right at the headerPremium09-04-2024 | ArticleMarket seems to embrace the Ecorobotix ARA-spotsprayer30-08-2023 | NewsBBLeap presents new camera Carbon Bee with PWM technology17-08-2023 | NewsSolar powered wireless camera system Buyers guides & Catalogues Subscribe to our YouTube channel Taiwan Smart Agriweek 2026Sep 8-10, 2026 TaiNEX 1, Tapei
translationZh:
农机制造商Horsch已战略性入股德国公司Sam-Dimension。Sam-Dimension专门提供利用无人机影像生成的施药地图，用于杂草点状喷洒。两家公司自2019年起便已开展合作。

Sam-Dimension开发了一款特殊相机，据该公司称其分辨率达到1毫米。利用这些相机图像，Sam-Dimension的人工智能系统Sam-Cam AI可生成施药地图，该地图可加载到田间喷药机上，将其转变为点状喷药机。据Sam-Dimension称，其系统每小时处理能力为60公顷。

**多种作物**
Sam-Dimension的系统适用于多种作物，如洋葱、马铃薯、胡萝卜和甜菜，以及绿色-棕色背景下的应用。这些施药地图可用于任何配备GPS控制分区功能的田间喷药机。除Horsch外，Sam-Dimension的施药地图还可与Amazone、John Deere、Hardi和Agrifac等品牌的喷药机配合使用。
author: Lucas van de Weijer
contentHtml: Machinery manufacturer Horsch has taken a strategic stake in the German company Sam-Dimension. Sam-Dimension specialises in supplying application maps created using drone imagery for spot spraying against weeds. The 2 companies have already been working together since 2019. Sam-Dimension has developed a special camera with a resolution of 1 millimetre, according to the specialist itself. […]
